__comment__: This file was automatically created by mcresources
name: 農作物

pages.text: 農作物是食物與一些材料的來源。雖然每種農作物略有不同，但它們都遵循一些相似的原則。要開始種植作物，你需要一些$(thing)種子$()，透過搜尋$(l:the_world/wild_crops)野生作$()並破壞它們來取得。$(br2)取得種子後還需要一把$(thing)鋤頭$()。種子也可以用作$(l:mechanics/fishing)魚餌$()。
除了尋找野生作物外，還可以從現有的​​作物中獲得種子。當完全成熟的作物因天氣原因死亡或任其枯萎後就會結籽，留下更多種子，這些種子可以用來在下個季節種植更多作物。

pages.title: 目錄
pages.text:
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#barley)大麥$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#beet)甜菜$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#cabbage)高麗菜$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#canola)油菜$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#carrot)胡蘿蔔$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#cucumber)黄瓜$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#flax)亞麻$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#garlic)大蒜$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#green_bean)四季豆$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#jute)黄麻$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#lentil)扁豆$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#maize)玉米$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#melon)西瓜$()

$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#oat)燕麥$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#onion)洋蔥$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#papyrus)紙莎草$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#potato)馬鈴薯$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#pumpkin)南瓜$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#radish)蘿蔔$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#red_bell_pepper)紅甜椒$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#rice)大米$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#rye)黑麥$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#soybean)大豆$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#squash)櫛瓜$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#sugarcane)甘蔗$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#sunflower)向日葵$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#tomatoes)番茄$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#wheat)小麥$()
$(li)$(l:tfc:mechanics/crops#yellow_bell_pepper)黄甜椒$()
首先，如上圖$(thing)打製石器$()製作$(thing)石鋤$()。
鋤頭打製成型後，即可製成鋤頭。$(br2)鋤頭的功能與原版相同，右鍵泥土即可將其變成$(thing)耕地$()。也可以將$(thing)纏根土$()變成$(thing)泥土$()。
所有作物都需要種植在耕地上才能生長。有些作物還有其他特殊要求，例如需要種在水裡或需要支架才能生長。$(br2)作物生長不一定需要$(thing)養分$()，但養分有助於作物生長。養分主要有三種：$(b)氮$()、$(6)磷$()和$(d)鉀$()。每種作物都有其偏好的養分。
pages.title: 種植作物

pages.text: 作物吸收偏好的養分後會加快生長速度，採收時產量也會提高。這意味著，作物消耗越多養分採收時會掉落更多食物！攝取某種養分也有助於補充少量其他養分。$(br2)接下來的幾頁列出了群巒傳說存在的所有作物
$(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)温度$()：-8 - 26 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：18 - 75 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：氮$(br2)大麥是種一格高的作物。產出$(thing)大麥$()和$(thing)大麥種子$()。
pages.title: 大麥

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)温度$()：3 - 40 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：35 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：磷$(br2)燕麥是種一格高的作物。產出$(thing)燕麥$()和$(thing)燕麥種子$()。
pages.title: 燕麥

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)温度$()：-11 - 30 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：25 - 85 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：磷$(br2)黑麥是種一格高的作物。產出$(thing)黑麥$()和$(thing)黑麥種子$()。
pages.title: 黑麥

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)温度$()：13 - 40 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：75 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：磷$(br2)玉米是種兩格高的作物。產出$(thing)玉米$()和$(thing)玉米種子$()。
pages.title: 玉米

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)温度$()：-4 - 35 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：25 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：磷$(br2)小麥是種一格高的作物。產出$(thing)小麥$()和$(thing)小麥種子$()。
pages.title: 小麥

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)温度$()：15 - 30 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：25 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：磷$(br2)水稻是種一格高的作物。水稻必須種在浸泡一格淡水的耕地。產出$(thing)水稻$()和$(thing)水稻種子$()。
pages.title: 水稻

pages.text: 注意：種植水稻種子的方塊必須在$(thing)水中$()。
$(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)温度$()：-5 - 20 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：18 - 85 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：鉀$(br2)甜菜是種一格高的作物。產出$(thing)甜菜$()和$(thing)甜菜種子$()。
pages.title: 甜菜

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)温度$()：-10 - 27 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：15 - 65 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：氮$(br2)高麗菜是種一格高的作物。產出$(thing)高麗菜$()和$(thing)高麗菜種子$()。
pages.title: 高麗菜

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)温度$()：3 - 30 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：25 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：鉀$(br2)胡蘿蔔是種一格高的作物。產出$(thing)胡蘿蔔$()和$(thing)胡蘿蔔種子$()。
pages.title: 胡蘿蔔

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): -20 - 18 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 15 - 75 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Nitrogen$(br2)Garlic is a single block crop. Garlic seeds can be planted on farmland and will produce $(thing)Garlic$() and $(thing)Garlic Seeds$() as a product.
pages.title: 大蒜

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): 2 - 35 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 38 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Nitrogen$(br2)Green Beans is a climbing two block tall crop. Green Bean seeds can be planted on farmland, will grow two blocks tall if a stick is present, and will produce $(thing)Green Beans$() and $(thing)Green Bean Seeds$() as a product.
pages.title: Green Beans

pages.text: The stick is required in order for the crop to fully grow.

$(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): -1 - 37 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 50 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Potassium$(br2)Potatoes are a single block crop. Potato seeds can be planted on farmland and will produce $(thing)Potatoes$() and $(thing)Potato Seeds$() as a product.
pages.title: Potatoes

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): 0 - 30 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 30 - 80 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Phosphorus$(br2)Pumpkins are a spreading crop. Pumpkin seeds can be planted on farmland and will place up to two $(thing)Pumpkin Blocks$() on the ground next to it while it is mature. If the pumpkin blocks are harvested, and the plant matures again, it can grow more pumpkins. Pumpkins can be made into $(l:mechanics/lighting#jack_o_lanterns)Jack 'o Lanterns$().
pages.title: Pumpkins

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): 5 - 37 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 75 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Phosphorus$(br2)Melons are a spreading crop. Melon seeds can be planted on farmland and will place up to two $(thing)Melon Blocks$() on the ground next to it while it is mature. If the melon blocks are harvested, and the plant matures again, it can grow more melon.
pages.title: Melons

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): 16 - 30 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 25 - 60 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Potassium$(br2)Red Bell Peppers are a pickable crop. When they are near mature, they can be harvested with $(item)$(k:key.use)$() to obtain Green Bell Peppers. Harvesting with $(item)$(k:key.use)$() allows the plant to grow more peppers in the future rather than destroying the plant.
pages.title: Red Bell Peppers

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): 16 - 30 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 25 - 60 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Potassium$(br2)Yellow Bell Peppers are a pickable crop. When they are near mature, they can be harvested with $(item)$(k:key.use)$() to obtain Green Bell Peppers. Harvesting with $(item)$(k:key.use)$() allows the plant to grow more peppers in the future rather than destroying the plant.
pages.title: 黃甜椒

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)温度$()：0 - 30 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：25 - 90 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：氮$(br2)洋蔥是種一格高的農作物。種植洋蔥會產出$(thing)洋蔥$()和$(thing)洋蔥種子$()。
pages.title: 洋蔥

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)温度$()：8 - 30 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：40 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：氮$(br2)大豆是種一格高的農作物。種植大豆會產出$(thing)大豆$()和$(thing)大豆種子$()。
pages.title: 大豆

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)温度$()：5 - 33 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：23 - 95 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：鉀$(br2)櫛瓜是種一格高的農作物。種植櫛瓜會產出$(thing)櫛瓜$()和$(thing)櫛瓜種子$()。
pages.title: 櫛瓜

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): 12 - 38 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 40 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Potassium$(br2)Sugarcane is a two block tall crop. Sugarcane seeds can be planted on farmland, will grow two blocks tall, and will produce $(thing)Sugarcane$() and $(thing)Sugarcane Seeds$() as a product. Sugarcane can be used to make $(thing)Sugar$().
pages.title: 甘蔗

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): 0 - 36 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 30 - 95 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Potassium$(br2)Tomatoes are a climbing two block tall crop. Tomato seeds can be planted on farmland, will grow two blocks tall if a stick is present, and will produce $(thing)Tomatoes$() and $(thing)Tomato Seeds$() as a product.
pages.title: Tomatoes

pages.text: The stick is required in order for the crop to fully grow.

$(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): 5 - 37 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 25 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Potassium$(br2)Jute is a two block tall crop. Jute seeds can be planted on farmland, will grow two blocks tall, and will produce $(thing)Jute$() and $(thing)Jute Seeds$() as a product.
pages.title: 黃麻

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): 19 - 37 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 70 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Potassium$(br2)Papyrus is a two block tall crop. Papyrus seeds can be planted on farmland, will grow two blocks tall, and will produce $(l:mechanics/papermaking)Papyrus$() and $(thing)Papyrus Seeds$() as a product.
pages.title: 紙莎草

pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): 5 - 40 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 20 - 80 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Nitrogen$(br2)A Sunflower is a two block tall crop. Sunflower seeds can be planted on farmland, will grow two blocks tall, and will produce $(item)Sunflower Caps$() which can be processed into $(thing)Seed Oil$(). Seed Oil can both be used as Lamp Fuel, as well as $(thing)Bio Diesel$() later on.$(br)A Sunflower also counts as a Flower for the purposes of $(l:firmalife/beekeeping)Beekeeping$().
pages.title: 向日葵

pages.text: $(thing)Wild Sunflowers$() grow between 5 and 40C, and 100 to 450mm of rainfall. Their seeds can also be roasted and eaten!

$(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)Temperature$(): -5 - 25 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)Hydration$(): 10 - 60 %$(br)$(bold)Nutrient$(): Phosphorus$(br2)Canola is a two block tall crop. Canola seeds can be planted on farmland, will grow two blocks tall, and will produce $(item)Canola Ovules$() which can be processed into $(thing)Seed Oil$(). Seed Oil can both be used as Lamp Fuel, as well as $(thing)Bio Diesel$() later on.$(br)Canola also counts as a Flower for the purposes of $(l:firmalife/beekeeping)Beekeeping$().
pages.title: 油菜

pages.text: $(thing)野生油菜$()也稱為$(thing)油菜籽$()，生長在 -7°C 到 25°C的溫度區間與 50 到 350毫米的降雨環境。

$(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)溫度$()：-8°C - 25°C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$()：15 - 65 %$(br)$(bold)養分$()：氮$(br2)亞麻是種兩格高的農作物。亞麻種子可種在耕地，能生長到兩格高，產出用於加工的$(item)亞麻莖桿$()，可用於製作$(thing)亞麻布$()或$(thing)粗麻布$()。$(br)$(l:firmalife/beekeeping)養蜂$()系统，視亞麻為有效花源。
pages.title: 亞麻

pages.text: $(thing)野生亞麻$()生長在 -5°C 到 23°C 的溫度區間與 175 至 475毫米 的降雨環境。

$(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)溫度$(): 5 - 40 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$(): 70 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)養分$(): 氮$(br2)黃瓜是種兩格高的農作物。黄瓜種子可種在耕地，能生長到兩格高，產出作為$(thing)蔬菜$()$(item)的黄瓜$()。$(br)$(bold)種植黃瓜需要插根木棍才能完全成熟。$()
pages.title: 黄瓜

pages.text: $(thing)野生黄瓜$()生長在 15°C 至 40°C的溫度區間與 0 到 150 毫米的降雨環境。

pages.title: 菜頭
pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)溫度$(): -20 - 20 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$(): 15 - 65 %$(br)$(bold)養分$(): 鉀$(br2)蘿蔔作為$(thing)蔬菜$()食用。若要在寒冷的地方生存，蘿蔔是不錯的選擇。
$(thing)野生蘿蔔$()生長在 -16°C 至 4°C的溫度區間與 75 到 325 毫米的降雨環境。

pages.title: 扁豆
pages.text: $(bold)$(l:the_world/climate#temperature)溫度$(): -20 - 18 °C$(br)$(bold)$(l:mechanics/hydration)濕度$(): 50 - 100 %$(br)$(bold)養分$(): 磷$(br2)扁豆作為$(thing)蔬菜$()食用，建議先煮熟。在寒冷氣候地區，扁豆是另一種不錯的作物。
$(thing)野生扁豆$()生長在 -18°C 至 2°C的溫度區間與 250 到 425 毫米的降雨環境。
